final_prompt.prompt:
Create an original, non-infringing e-commerce promotional poster for 绿联私有云 brand 618 anniversary sale campaign.

Style/medium: needs a 618 大促电商 festive-tech aesthetic — exact stylistic execution is yours
Composition: needs a bold hero-banner layout with clear visual hierarchy — exact framing is yours
Subject: must include 绿联私有云 as the focal brand subject
Scene/backdrop: needs an energetic 618 sale campaign atmosphere — exact backdrop treatment is yours
Lighting/mood: needs a vibrant, celebratory high-energy mood — exact light source mix is yours
Color palette: needs a direction that balances tech-brand credibility with 618 promotional excitement — exact hex values and ratios are yours
Materials/textures: 
Text (verbatim): must include "绿联私有云" (brand name), "618" (prominent), "周年庆" (secondary)
Constraints: 
Avoid:
